latin: Ego sum maximus! ante me nemo talis fuit, post me nemo talis erit. sum papilio qui volat, sum apis quae pungit. ego sum maximus!

questions.prompt: What does the speaker call himself?
What two creatures does he compare himself to?

translation: I am the greatest! Before me there was no one like me, after me there will be no one like me. I am a butterfly that flies, I am a bee that stings. I am the greatest!
